prestazioni: Engine: M113K 5.4L V8 supercharged (349hp stock) – Full forged internals build by **AMG Performance Studio** including **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and **ARP L19 head studs** for 15psi+ boost capability with **Weistec Engineering Stage 3 supercharger pulley kit (2.75" overdrive)** and **Vortech V-7 YSi trim centrifugal supercharger (1,200hp capable)**

Forced Induction: **Garrett GTX4202R ball-bearing turbocharger (62mm inducer, 82mm exducer)** with **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **custom 4" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Supersprint (Euro 6-compliant, 304-grade mandrel-bent tubing)**

Drivetrain & Handling: **Weistec Engineering 4Matic+ rear-biased torque vectoring system (70/30 split)** with **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way, 450lb-ft torque capacity)** and **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (adjustable rebound, compression, and ride height with remote reservoirs)** paired with **H&R 30mm front / 25mm rear anti-roll bars** and **Brembo GT 6-piston 400mm front / 4-piston 380mm rear big brake kit (two-piece floating rotors, Pagid RS29 pads)**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (G-Class specific, 100mm front / 120mm rear fender flares)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for OEM+ fitment) and rear diffuser by Prior Design**

**Rotiform LAS-R 20x10.5" ET15 (front) / 20x12" ET25 (rear) forged wheels (10-spoke, 5x130 PCD, 50mm center bore)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35R20 front, 325/30R20 rear)** with **H&R Trak+ 15mm spacers (front) for flush fitment**

**AMG G63-style LED headlights (Lux H8 V4S projectors, 5,000-lumen output) with **custom smoked housings and **Morimoto XB35 HID fog lights** paired with **Vland sequential LED taillights (DRL-integrated, 300-LED matrix per side)** and **debadged rear with **G55 AMG carbon fiber badge (by 3D Carbon)**
